title: Highlighting Surreel Saltwaters
summary: Surreel Saltwaters: For All Your Halibut and Salmon Adventures Hope and Charlie Upicksoun and their daughter Avilu (their 10-year-old exuberant little captain) are experienced Alaskan Native deep-sea fishing guides out of Valdez. title: In Memoriam – Louise Avessuk (Keller) Bauman
summary: Louise at camp where she loved to be. Photo provided by Eda Keller. SNC is deeply saddened by the passing of lifelong Nome resident Louise Avessuk (Keller) Bauman. title: Meet Stacie Stigar!
summary: Our team has been able to serve the state due to the experience, skills, and support of our temps. This week, we’re proud to introduce you to Stacie!
